structure.description: Pinned posts surface as a dismissible strip at the top of an entity detail page (or home). Author, body, and post-type icon visible; deprecation-notice variant has elevated tone. Embedded blog as platform-team broadcast channel.

rationale.hypothesis: Operational changes (deprecation, schema break, planned downtime) need in-context broadcast — tied to the entity, seen by anyone who lands there. Out-of-band channels (email, Slack) miss anyone who searches later.

evidence.description: Pinned Posts on dataset and home pages — announcements and deprecation notices

shouldMatch.reason: Author posts deprecation notice on workflow
